product_overview: A web application that centralizes daily construction operations, workforce tracking, transaction management, payroll, and land project tracking into a single operational workspace for admin and field users. It provides a dashboard for quick visibility and in-app workflows to create, review, and lock operational and financial records.
core_goals: Capture daily labor attendance and field activity quickly and consistently.
Create, review, and reconcile income and expense records tied to projects and operations.
Generate payroll for defined periods and enforce payroll period lock/unlock controls.
Provide a single dashboard for operational and financial visibility and fast navigation to core modules.
Track land project lifecycle and project-related financials with clear status and notes.

features.name: Authentication and Role Access
features.description: Allow admin users to sign in, establish a session, and access protected workflows according to role permissions.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill username or credential fields. -> Fill password field. -> Submit login form. -> Open protected modules after successful authentication. -> Land on workspace at /
Navigate to /login -> Fill username or credential fields. -> Fill password field. -> Submit login form with incorrect credentials -> See validation error for invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard and Operational Overview
features.description: Present operational and financial summary cards and metrics with quick actions into core modules.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open dashboard from main app. -> Review summary cards and key metrics. -> Navigate to target module from dashboard actions
Navigate to / -> Open dashboard from main app. -> Inspect period-based trend or summary card -> Use dashboard action to navigate to related transactions or payroll view

features.name: Finance and Transaction Management
features.description: Create, edit, delete, and review income and expense records tied to operations and projects.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Create income and expense entries. -> Save new transaction entry -> See transaction present in transaction list
Navigate to / -> Filter or review transaction lists. -> Select a transaction to edit -> Edit existing transaction details. -> Save changes and confirm updated values in list
Navigate to / -> Filter or review transaction lists. -> Identify an incorrect record -> Delete incorrect records. -> Confirm record no longer appears in list

features.name: Workforce: Attendance and Daily Logs
features.description: Record daily labor attendance, machine work, sand production and event logs from field and office workflows.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log attendance and labor details. -> Save attendance entry -> See attendance reflected in daily lists
Navigate to / -> Record machine work, sand production, and event logs. -> Save daily logs -> Verify logs appear in daily activity list

features.name: Payroll Generation and Period Control
features.description: Generate payroll snapshots for selected periods, store computed pay components, and enforce payroll period lock/unlock controls with admin trace.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Generate payroll for selected period. -> Review payroll snapshot with base pay, OT, allowances, and deductions. -> Lock payroll period
Navigate to / -> Generate payroll for selected period. -> Lock payroll period -> Attempt to edit locked payroll entries -> See permission or lock restriction message

features.name: Employee Management
features.description: Create and maintain employee profiles, wage types, positions, and salary history for payroll and assignment purposes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open employee management module from main app. -> Create employee profile with wage type and position. -> Save and see new employee listed
Navigate to / -> Open employee management module from main app. -> Select an employee to update -> Update wage type or position and save -> Confirm updated profile details in list

features.name: Land Project Management
features.description: Track land purchases and project lifecycle with seller details, payment values, statuses, and notes for due diligence and handover.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open land project module from main app. -> Create land project with seller, deed details, area, and payment values. -> Save and see project listed
Navigate to / -> Open land project module from main app. -> Update project status to Deposit -> Add notes for payment progress -> Move project status to PaidFull and later to Transferred

features.name: Planning (Daily / Weekly / Monthly)
features.description: Create and track work plans by scope, set task status, and carry over incomplete tasks between periods.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open planning module from main app. -> Create plan by selecting Daily scope and adding tasks. -> Save plan and see tasks with status Todo
Navigate to / -> Open planning module from main app. -> Mark tasks as Done during execution -> Move incomplete tasks to next period as carry-over

features.name: Settings, Master Data and Administration
features.description: Configure organization profile, app defaults, configurable lists, and manage admin user accounts and audit traces.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open settings or administration from main app. -> Update organization profile or branding defaults. -> Save changes and confirm updated settings
Navigate to / -> Open settings or administration from main app. -> Manage configurable lists (cars, job descriptions, categories) -> Add or update list entries and save
Navigate to / -> Open settings or administration from main app. -> Create or modify admin accounts -> Save account changes and verify admin appears in user list

routes.description: Main authenticated construction management workspace and module navigation.
Admin login and session entry flow.

Navigate to target module from dashboard actions.
